parsed.summary: This is a promotional or cover page for a McQuay Centrifugal Water Cooled Chiller (model series WSC/WCC/WDC). It features the product name, a photograph of the chiller unit, branding, contact information for Chinese branches, and marketing imagery. It is not a technical diagram or data sheet.

visual_entities.label: McQuay China branch structure contact details

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful: WSC/WCC/WDC 全球制冷剂的最佳选择: R134a WSC-WCC-WDC 079~158(1054.8kW~9141.6kW) 麦克维尔—离心式冷水机组 McQuay Centrifugal Water Cooled Chiller www.mcquay.com.cn 麦克维尔中国分支结构 麦克维尔中央空凋有限公司 地址: 上海市闸北区共和新路 1868号1号楼9楼 电话: (021) 3387 0088 传真: (021) 3387 0218 深圳麦克维尔空调有限公司 地址: 深圳市龙岗区平湖街道 芳坑路10号 电话: (0755) 2845 6472 传真: (0755) 2845 6469 麦克维尔空调制冷（武汉）有限公司 地址: 武汉经济技术开发区 东城大道33号 电话: (027) 5940 8688 传真: (027) 5940 8664 麦克维尔空调制冷（苏州）有限公司 地址: 江苏省苏州市工业园区 长阳街116号 电话: (0512) 8918 0188 传真: (0512) 8918 0189 McQuay Air Conditioning 全国统一服务热线: 9510 5363 欢迎访问麦克维尔网站: www.mcquay.com.cn 机型、参数、性能因产品的改良而有所改变，恕不另行通知。具体参数以产品铭牌为准。PM-WSC/WCC/WDC-C009 CH1305-5000-A © 版权所有
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page type is classified as 'other' because it is primarily promotional material, not a technical manual page with diagrams or tables. The specific model range and refrigerant (R134a) are visible, but no technical relationships (e.g., wiring, schematics) are present.

parsed.summary: This is a disclaimer and branding page from a McQuay Air Conditioning manual. It contains the company logo, three disclaimer statements in Chinese regarding product variations and documentation accuracy, a document code, and a watermark from a third-party website.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
McQuay®
Air Conditioning
★ 印刷资料内的产品可能与实物有差别，购买时请参考实机。
★ 所有资料经过仔细审核，如有任何印刷错漏，麦克维尔公司不承担因此产生的后果。
★ 机型、参数、性能会因产品的改良有所改变，恕不另行通知。具体参数请以产品铭牌为准。
CH1206-3000-F
制冷百家网整理: www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page contains no technical diagrams, schematics, or specific equipment data. The watermark indicates the source of this specific document scan, not necessarily the original publisher.
